_comment: Known-answer Ed25519 conformance vector for lib/verify.mjs. THIS gene is the canonical source; every vendored copy (the known.life registry worker's src/registry/lib/lifekey-verify.mjs, the secrets vault) must verify signature_b64 as valid and reject tampered_signature_b64. A consumer vendors THIS file alongside verify.mjs (scripts/vendor-lifekey.sh), so a drift in any copy fails that copy's own suite against the same fixed answer. Regenerate: generate an ed25519 keypair, pack the raw pubkey into the ssh-ed25519 wire blob, sign the nonce, base64 everything, and flip one byte of the signature for tampered_signature_b64.
